inputs.label: Climber Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the climber including all gear carried.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the climber including all gear carried.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tırmanıcının taşıdığı tüm ekipman dahil kütlesi.

inputs.label: Rope Length Out
inputs.businessContext: Total length of rope paid out from belay device to climber.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of rope paid out from belay device to climber.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emniyet cihazından tırmanıcıya verilen toplam halat uzunluğu.

inputs.label: Length of Fall
inputs.businessContext: Vertical distance the climber falls before rope begins to catch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical distance the climber falls before rope begins to catch.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Halatın tutmaya başlamadan önce tırmanıcının düştüğü dikey mesafe.

inputs.label: Rope Impact Force Rating
inputs.businessContext: Maximum impact force measured for a standard UIAA fall (80 kg, fall factor 1.77) as specified by the rope manufacturer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum impact force measured for a standard UIAA fall (80 kg, fall factor 1.77) as specified by the rope manufacturer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretici tarafından belirtilen standart UIAA düşüşü (80 kg, düşüş faktörü 1.77) için ölçülen maksimum darbe kuvveti.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
